title: Lacrosse
notes: Lacrosse counts as a hard multidirectional running day.
recoveryRule: Hydrate, eat normally, and keep the next off-ice session quality-focused.
doNotDoRule: No extra hard conditioning after lacrosse.
trackingQuestions: How hard did it feel from 1-5?

title: Lacrosse
notes: Second possible weekly lacrosse load before the end of June.
recoveryRule: Use Sunday as recovery if legs are heavy.
doNotDoRule: Do not add sprint or agility work.
trackingQuestions: How hard did it feel from 1-5?

title: Lacrosse
notes: Final planned lacrosse load before the end of June.
recoveryRule: Adjust the next skill day if energy or leg freshness is low.
doNotDoRule: No extra hard dryland on the same day.
trackingQuestions: How hard did it feel from 1-5?

title: Chae Hull Camp
notes: Camp day with approximately 2 hours of ice.
recoveryRule: Camp replaces hard dryland. Prioritize food, hydration, and sleep.
doNotDoRule: No hard dryland or conditioning.

title: Chae Hull Camp
notes: Camp day with approximately 2 hours of ice.
recoveryRule: Use recovery-only work outside camp.
doNotDoRule: No hard dryland or make-up session.

title: Chae Hull Camp
notes: Camp day with approximately 2 hours of ice.
recoveryRule: Optional off-ice work must stay easy and brief.
doNotDoRule: No additional hard skill volume.

title: Chae Hull Camp
notes: Camp day with approximately 2 hours of ice.
recoveryRule: Hydrate and protect sleep before the final camp day.
doNotDoRule: No extra conditioning.

title: Chae Hull Camp
notes: Final camp day with approximately 2 hours of ice.
recoveryRule: Weekend recovery and normal easy activity.
doNotDoRule: Do not make up missed dryland work.

title: Powerskating & Pucks
notes: On-ice powerskating and puck session.
recoveryRule: Treat as the day's hard load and recover afterward.
doNotDoRule: No hard dryland on the same day.

title: Powerskating & Pucks
notes: On-ice powerskating and puck session.
recoveryRule: Treat as the day's hard load and protect Sunday recovery.
doNotDoRule: No hard dryland on the same day.

title: Carleton Ravens Camp
notes: All-day camp with approximately 2-3 hours of ice.
recoveryRule: Camp replaces hard dryland. Prioritize food, hydration, and sleep.
doNotDoRule: No hard dryland or conditioning.

title: Carleton Ravens Camp
notes: All-day camp with approximately 2-3 hours of ice.
recoveryRule: Only easy mobility or light touches outside camp.
doNotDoRule: No additional hard skill session.

title: Carleton Ravens Camp
notes: All-day camp with approximately 2-3 hours of ice.
recoveryRule: Protect hydration, food, and sleep.
doNotDoRule: No hard dryland or make-up work.

title: Carleton Ravens Camp
notes: Final all-day camp day with approximately 2-3 hours of ice.
recoveryRule: Use the weekend for recovery and normal easy activity.
doNotDoRule: Do not complete the planned hard dryland session.

title: Advanced Skills
notes: Advanced on-ice skills session.
recoveryRule: Treat as a hard skill load and recover afterward.
doNotDoRule: No hard dryland on the same day.

title: Tryout Session
notes: On-ice tryout session.
recoveryRule: Arrive fresh and use recovery only afterward.
doNotDoRule: No hard training before or after the session.

title: Sensplex Camp
notes: All-day camp with approximately 2-3 hours of ice.
recoveryRule: Camp replaces hard dryland. Prioritize food, hydration, and sleep.
doNotDoRule: No hard dryland or conditioning.

title: Sensplex Camp
notes: All-day camp with approximately 2-3 hours of ice.
recoveryRule: Use recovery only outside camp.
doNotDoRule: No extra hard work.

title: Sensplex Camp
notes: All-day camp with approximately 2-3 hours of ice.
recoveryRule: Optional skill work must stay easy and brief.
doNotDoRule: Do not complete the planned full skill session.

title: Sensplex Camp
notes: All-day camp with approximately 2-3 hours of ice.
recoveryRule: Protect hydration, food, and sleep before the final day.

title: Sensplex Camp
